examples: The lingerie was exquisite; silk, handmade and trimmed with a cobweb of lace.
She detailed the lingerie and skirt with lace and embroidery.
We dropped her off in the lingerie department, but when we returned, we couldn't find her.
It was renamed Schuylkill Silk Manufacturing in 1914 when it expanded into silk lingerie.
And for good measure, the lingerie store-owner identified Griffin in a photo lineup.
